category_sources: source_facts.description says official Python bindings for Qt; Qt docs describe Qt for Python/PySide6 as official Python bindings for Qt.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pyside; Qt official docs and wiki use PySide/PySide6 under Qt for Python.
docs_sources: Official Qt documentation domain for Qt for Python is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official Qt for Python build documentation shows cloning pyside-setup from code.qt.io; Qt wiki identifies Qt Project Gerrit/code.qt.io as the official repository location.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables shiboken6, and Qt official docs identify Python Qt bindings and binding generator functionality.
